name: MSA Analysis
description: Multiple sequence alignment using Clustal Omega, MUSCLE, or MAFFT. Automatically selects optimal algorithm based on sequence count and characteristics. Supports FASTA input with up to thousands of sequences. Outputs alignment statistics and quality metrics.
capabilities: Multiple sequence alignment using Clustal Omega, MUSCLE, or MAFFT
Automatically selects optimal algorithm based on sequence count and characteristics
Supports FASTA input with up to thousands of sequences
Outputs alignment statistics and quality metrics

sequences.description: FASTA file with sequences for multiple sequence alignment
